title: Data Link Layer Protocol Flow
description: A flowchart depicting the sequence of operations for a typical data link layer protocol, including frame handling, error control, and flow control.
relationships: Sender encapsulates packet into frame with CRC
Sender transmits frame and starts timer
Receiver checks frame for errors using CRC
If error-free, Receiver sends ACK and delivers packet to network layer
If errors found, Receiver discards frame and sends NAK
Sender retransmits frame upon receiving NAK or timer timeout
Sender proceeds to next frame upon receiving ACK
